meta.title: Housing & Basic Utilities
meta.subtitle: Homeownership, electricity, drinking water, and sanitation access by state
meta.source: Census 2011 Housing Tables, Registrar General of India; NFHS-5 2019–21, IIPS/MoHFW
notes: Homeownership data is from Census 2011 and may not reflect post-2011 changes.
Electricity, water, and sanitation figures are from NFHS-5 (2019-21) and are more recent.
Improved drinking water includes piped, borehole, protected dug well, rainwater, and packaged water.
Improved sanitation includes flush toilets and pit latrines with slabs.
meta.methodology: NFHS-5 uses USAID DHS methodology. Census homeownership asks the household respondent whether they own or rent the dwelling.
